_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin haploinsufficiency results in altered spermatogenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: we observed a significant increase in total PI3K expression in Nf1+/- mice when compared to Nf1 control mice
details: Successfully detected significant increase in total PI3K expression in Nf1+/- mice compared to controls by Western blot
